creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
While running a KCSAN-enabled kernel on a recent -CURRENT (r365373) the kernel reports the following race conditions or racy access. Please note that these messages where generated during three boot attempts.

CSan: Racy Access [Cpu0 Write Addr=0xfffffe000852d0c8 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8119730a<tdq_add>] [Cpu1 Read Addr=0xfffffe000852d0c8 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff81198368<sched_idletd>]
CSan: Racy Access [Cpu0 Write Addr=0xfffff800fee00320 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8193cb08<lapic_et_start>] [Cpu1 Write Addr=0xfffff800fee00320 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8193cb08<lapic_et_start>]
CSan: Racy Access [Cpu0 Write Addr=0xffffffff82316a00 Size=8 PC=0xffffffff81167c84<tc_windup>] [Cpu1 Read Addr=0xffffffff82316a00 Size=8 PC=0xffffffff8116633c<binuptime>]
CSan: Racy Access [Cpu1 Write Addr=0xfffff800fee00320 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8193cb08<lapic_et_start>] [Cpu0 Write Addr=0xfffff800fee00320 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8193cb08<lapic_et_start>]


CSan: Racy Access [Cpu0 Read Addr=0xffffffff836310c8 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8119261a<cpu_search_highest>] [Cpu1 Write Addr=0xffffffff836310c8 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8119730a<tdq_add>]

CSan: Racy Access [Cpu0 Write Addr=0xfffff800fee00380 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8193cb61<lapic_et_start>] [Cpu1 Write Addr=0xfffff800fee00380 Size=4 PC=0xffffffff8193cb61<lapic_et_start>]
